identity.name: ARA Standard
identity.description: The official specification, tools, and examples for the ARA (Agent-Ready Architecture) open web standard. ARA enables any website to be understood and interacted with by autonomous AI agents.

content_map.summary: ARA v1.0 specification with 3-layer architecture (Discovery, Understanding, Interaction), 4 sector examples, validator and generator tools

resources.label: ARA v1.0 Specification
resources.description: Full technical specification for the 3-layer ARA architecture

resources.label: Implementation Examples
resources.description: Ready-to-use ARA manifests for e-commerce, SaaS, media, and restaurant sites

resources.label: ARA Tools
resources.description: Validator and generator CLI tools for ARA adoption

meta.note: This site is itself ARA-ready — we eat our own dog food.
